currency.note: Conversion rate used for ARS-quoted tariffs

validation.source: Google Places API (New) + Booking.com BrightData scrapes + editorial research
criteria: Buenos Aires city and province; excludes hotels that are mass-market, weakly romantic, unbookable online, or Google-rated 3.9 and below
Upper-class / non-mass-market romantic by EU–US taste: palace hotels, design hotels, Relais & Châteaux, historic estancias, polo clubs, adults spa resorts, small boutiques
Google Maps rating above 3.9 (3.9 and below excluded)
Has live published per-night pricing from an online hotel/booking source; package-only and on-request entries excluded

excluded.name: Hotel San Carlos (Areco)
excluded.reason: High-volume spa hotel; too mass-market for this list

excluded.name: La Posta del Pilar
excluded.reason: Suburban spa hotel; not upper-class romantic

excluded.name: Estancia La Cinacina
excluded.reason: Tourist day-trip estancia with shows

excluded.name: Elevage General Rodriguez Resort
excluded.reason: Weak official web presence; aggregator listings only

excluded.name: El Metejón Polo Resort
excluded.reason: Not listed on Booking.com or other hotel OTAs; overnight stays only via direct contact

excluded.name: Estancia La Madrugada Areco
excluded.reason: No live per-night room price found; only a third-party from-rate plus a Booking.com availability page without rendered room pricing

excluded.name: La Becasina Delta Lodge
excluded.reason: Published pricing is package/per-person rather than a live per-night room rate

excluded.name: Estancia La Candelaria
excluded.reason: Online availability page exists, but no live per-night room price was found

excluded.name: Estancia La Sofía
excluded.reason: Booking engine is live, but the stored rate was not verified as a current per-night room price

excluded.name: Estancia Santa Ángela
excluded.reason: Online availability page exists, but no live per-night room price was found

excluded.name: Estancia El Rosario de Areco
excluded.reason: Online availability pages exist, but no reliable live per-night room price was found

excluded.name: Refugio Pueblo
excluded.reason: Online availability page exists, but no live per-night room price was found

excluded.name: Puesto Viejo Estancia & Polo Club
excluded.reason: Online availability page exists, but no live per-night room price was found

excluded.name: Casa Farrell - Boutique Adultos - Casco Historico
excluded.reason: Beautiful adults-only Areco house/suite, but Booking classifies it as a vacation home and no live per-night price rendered in the dated scrape

excluded.name: Mizu Hotel Boutique
excluded.reason: Strong Mar de las Pampas romantic fit, but Booking.com showed no availability or live per-night price for the tested dates

excluded.name: Pie de Piedra Hotel Boutique
excluded.reason: Strong Sierra de la Ventana fit, but Booking.com showed no availability or live per-night price for the tested dates

excluded.name: Estancia La Elena Hotel Boutique
excluded.reason: Live Booking price and Maps rating clear the minimum, but Booking comfort/value and overall score are weaker than the upper-class cut for this list

excluded.name: Hotel Costa Galana
excluded.reason: Luxury Mar del Plata hotel, but too large and city-resort/mass-market for this non-mass-market romantic shortlist

excluded.name: Home Hotel Buenos Aires
excluded.reason: Romantic Palermo boutique, but the dated Booking.com scrape did not render a live per-night room price for the checked stay

excluded.name: Mine Hotel Boutique
excluded.reason: Romantic Palermo boutique candidate, but no direct Booking.com hotel page surfaced in the Booking.com-focused SERP pass

factors.pedigree: 0–30: Relais & Châteaux, historic palace, luxury-press shortlist, owner boutique, spa resort
factors.setting: 0–25: private campo/palace/delta water > city palace/design scene > polo lawns > historic town > spa grounds
factors.coupleFit: 0–20: adults-only / couple design > quiet min-age > family tourist estancia / sports resort

romanceRubric.note: Scores are editorial, not Google ratings. Default page sort uses romance.score descending.

hotels.name: Estancia La Bamba de Areco
hotels.sourceName: Estancia La Bamba de Areco - Relais & Chateaux -
hotels.fullAddress: Ruta 31 Km 7.5, B2760 San Antonio de Areco, Provincia de Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: Early-19th-century Relais & Châteaux estancia with 11 rooms, polo lawns and full-board stays. The usual pick when someone wants the Pampas version of a European country-house hotel.

price.note: BrightData scrape showed price per night from US$791.50; rounded for display.

romance.why: Relais & Châteaux country house with 11 rooms. Closest thing on this list to a European château weekend.

hotels.name: Palacio Duhau - Park Hyatt Buenos Aires
hotels.sourceName: Palacio Duhau - Park Hyatt Buenos Aires
hotels.fullAddress: Avenida Alvear 1661, Recoleta, C1014AAD Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: Belle Époque palace and modern tower on Avenida Alvear, with gardens, serious dining and a spa. The most obvious city choice when the brief is old-money romantic rather than merely comfortable.

price.note: BrightData Booking.com scrape for Aug 8-9, 2026 showed a double room from US$646 for one night, before city tax.

romance.why: Avenida Alvear palace, gardens, spa, and proper grand-hotel service. High romance without having to leave the city.

hotels.name: Alvear Palace Hotel
hotels.sourceName: Alvear Palace Hotel - Leading Hotels of the World
hotels.fullAddress: Av. Alvear 1891, Recoleta, C1129AAA Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: The classic Recoleta grand hotel: polished, formal, and unapologetically old-school. Best for couples who want marble, tea service, rooftop drinks and zero boutique minimalism.

price.includes: Breakfast available; some scraped rates included breakfast
price.note: BrightData Booking.com scrape for Aug 8-9, 2026 showed a discounted room from US$475 for one night, before city tax.

romance.why: Old-world Recoleta glamour and one of the city’s most ceremonial hotels. Less intimate than a boutique, but very strong for occasion travel.

hotels.name: Faena Hotel Buenos Aires
hotels.fullAddress: Martha Salotti 445, Puerto Madero, C1107CMB Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: Philippe Starck theatre in Puerto Madero: red velvet, pool, spa and Tango Rojo energy. Not quiet country romance; more dressed-up, cinematic city weekend.

price.includes: Breakfast available for an extra charge in scraped rate
price.note: BrightData Booking.com scrape for Aug 8-9, 2026 showed a deluxe queen room from US$475 for one night, before city tax.

romance.why: One of Buenos Aires’ few truly theatrical hotels. Strong for couples who want drama, dinner, spa and a night out built into the property.

hotels.name: Estancia Villa María
hotels.fullAddress: Av. Pereda S/N, B1812 Máximo Paz, Provincia de Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: Tudor-Norman casco on parkland about 45–60 minutes south of the city. Eleven rooms in the main house plus a French house annex; rates are per person, full board, with horses and park walks included.

price.note: BrightData Google result showed from US$248 including taxes and fees for a 1-night stay; official full-board tariffs can run higher.

romance.why: Tudor-Norman palace in parkland; the classic BA romantic campo overnight, even if the room count is higher than a Relais.

hotels.name: Four Seasons Hotel Buenos Aires
hotels.fullAddress: Posadas 1086/88, Retiro, C1011ABB Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: A belle-époque mansion attached to a polished tower, with Elena, Pony Line and a garden/pool scene. The safest luxury pick for service-minded couples.

price.includes: No breakfast inclusion shown in lowest scraped rate
price.note: BrightData Booking.com scrape for Aug 8-9, 2026 showed rooms from US$795 for one night, before city tax.

romance.why: Very high service floor, mansion atmosphere and excellent restaurants. Big-hotel energy, but still one of the city’s strongest couple hotels.

hotels.name: Algodon Mansion
hotels.fullAddress: Montevideo 1647, Retiro, C1021AAA Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: Small all-suite mansion hotel in the Recoleta/Retiro edge, with wine-club polish and a quieter residential feel than the big palace hotels.

price.includes: Continental breakfast included in scraped rate
price.note: BrightData Booking.com scrape for Aug 8-9, 2026 showed available rooms from US$544 for one night, before city tax.

romance.why: Small mansion scale, all-suite rooms and a residential Recoleta address. A better fit for quiet romance than for scene-chasing.

hotels.name: Legado Mítico Buenos Aires
hotels.fullAddress: Gurruchaga 1848, Palermo, C1414DIL Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: Eleven-room Palermo Soho boutique with literary, Argentine-themed rooms, balconies and a proper sense of place. More personal than luxury-chain Buenos Aires.

price.note: BrightData Booking.com scrape for Aug 8-9, 2026 showed rooms from US$231 for one night, before city tax.

romance.why: Small, atmospheric Palermo hotel with a strong sense of place. Excellent for couples who prefer boutique texture over lobby grandeur.

hotels.name: Hub Porteño
hotels.fullAddress: Rodríguez Peña 1967, Recoleta, C1021ABO Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: Tiny Recoleta boutique with oversized suites and a concierge-led angle. Less famous than the palaces, but more intimate and neighborhood-scaled.

price.note: BrightData Booking.com scrape for Aug 8-9, 2026 showed suites from US$345 for one night, before city tax.

romance.why: Very intimate Recoleta base with big suites and service focus. Good couple fit, just less architecturally special than the top mansion hotels.

hotels.name: Casa Bora Hotel
hotels.fullAddress: Domingo Faustino Sarmiento 175, B2760 San Antonio de Areco, Provincia de Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: Four-suite boutique in Areco's historic center, opened by a couple who left Villa Crespo after years of hotel-hopping abroad. Two rooms have private mini-pools; La Nación clocked weekend doubles from ARS 175,000 in early 2025.

price.note: BrightData search found Expedia-family availability around CA$208 total for one night; converted roughly to USD and paired with Vuelo online booking page.

romance.why: Four suites, couple-built, two with private mini-pools. Town, not campo, but the scale and intent are right.

hotels.name: Mestizo Hotel
hotels.fullAddress: Provincia de Santa Cruz 1505, B6070 Lincoln, Provincia de Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: Six-room 4-star boutique on the edge of Lincoln with a garden, seasonal pool, restaurant/teahouse and spa baths in some rooms. Farther than Areco (~4.5 hours), but the scale is couple-weekend sized.

price.note: BrightData search found a US$70 nightly price on ReadyToTrip; Booking.com page is live for date searches.

romance.why: Six rooms, garden quiet and spa baths — intimate boutique register. Loses points for distance from BA and no Relais/palace pedigree.

hotels.name: Estancia La Bandada
hotels.fullAddress: 35°28'46.9"S 58°41'56, RP41 km 120, 7220 San Miguel del Monte, Provincia de Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: Former Candelaria del Monte, now La Bandada: a 200-acre working farm about 90 minutes from Buenos Aires. The South America Specialists and The Telegraph still list it for a quiet Pampas night without Relais pricing.

price.note: BrightData search found Momondo around €476 and Telegraph from £1,091; displayed USD is a rough euro conversion, so current dates may differ sharply.
price.includes: Likely full-board estancia pricing; confirm current room/package before booking

romance.why: Quiet working farm on UK shortlists (Telegraph / South America Specialists). Low key, not a spa machine.

hotels.name: La Florida Casa Pueblo
hotels.sourceName: La Florida - Casa Pueblo Hotel & Cafe
hotels.fullAddress: Bolívar 321, B2760 San Antonio de Areco, Provincia de Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: Early-1900s house on Plaza Gómez with four large rooms, pool and recycled-wood interiors by Delfi Gismondi. Time Out's first pick for Areco town stays; same scale as Casa Bora, quieter design language.

price.note: BrightData Google result showed a Deluxe King room around US$105; Booking.com page is live for date searches.

romance.why: Four rooms in Areco's historic center with designer interiors. Town boutique intimacy; Time Out lead pick.

hotels.name: Hotel del Casco
hotels.fullAddress: Av. del Libertador 16170, B1642 San Isidro, Provincia de Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: Restored neoclassical mansion on cobbled Libertador in San Isidro's historic casco. About 20 rooms, Michelin/Tablet-listed, with a romantic-getaway package (champagne, chocolates, breakfast in room). Closest upper-class overnight on this list to the city.

price.includes: Often breakfast; romantic package priced separately
price.note: Kayak from-rate around US$135; Booking.com page is live for date searches.

romance.why: Michelin/Tablet palazzo with an explicit romantic package. Town elegance, not campo; room count keeps intimacy mid-pack.

hotels.name: 1828 Smart Hotel Boutique
hotels.address: Fray Justo Sta. María de Oro 1828
hotels.fullAddress: Fray Justo Sta. María de Oro 1828, Palermo, B1414 Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: Small Luxury Hotels member in Palermo with a spa, sauna and compact pool. Polished boutique option for couples who want Palermo restaurants within walking distance.

price.note: BrightData Booking.com scrape for Aug 8-9, 2026 showed rooms from US$246 for one night, before city tax.

romance.why: Well-run Palermo boutique with spa amenities and walkability. More practical date-weekend than destination hotel.

hotels.name: La Rosadita Estancia
hotels.fullAddress: HHHP+FX, B6720 San Andrés de Giles, Buenos Aires Province, Argentina
hotels.description: Recently renovated country-house hotel near San Andrés de Giles with pool, open-air bath, hot tub, garden views and a 9.7 Booking score. Less famous than the Areco estancias, but the room-and-pool setup reads as a proper couples weekend.

price.note: BrightData scrape for Aug 19-20, 2026 showed a Double Room from US$187 for 1 night.

romance.why: Country-house scale, very strong Booking score, pool and hot tub. Less pedigree than the historic Areco names, but highly couple-friendly.

hotels.name: Posada de la Plaza
hotels.fullAddress: Alvear 480, B2760 San Antonio de Areco, Provincia de Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: Late-19th-century house on Plaza Gómez with a handful of rooms and breakfast included. Walk-to-everything Areco stay if you want town streets at night instead of a dark campo driveway.

price.note: BrightData Google result showed around US$98; Booking.com page is live for date searches.

romance.why: Late-19th-century house on the plaza. Romantic if you want Areco streets at night; less so if you want silence and horses.

hotels.name: Altos de Tandil Hotel Boutique & Spa
hotels.sourceName: Altos de Tandil Hotel Boutique & Spa
hotels.fullAddress: Suiza 1320, B7000 Tandil, Provincia de Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: Boutique spa hotel in Tandil with mountain-view balconies, spa tubs, sauna, indoor pool and a 9.2 Booking score. A longer drive, but much more EU-style countryside-spa than highway weekend hotel.

price.note: BrightData scrape for Aug 19-20, 2026 showed a Standard Triple Room for two from US$142 and Standard Double from US$143.

romance.why: Mountain views, spa tubs, sauna and a strong Booking score. Family-room language keeps it below the small estancias and true boutiques.

hotels.name: Careyes Villa de Mar & Spa
hotels.fullAddress: Delfín s/n, B7165 Mar de las Pampas, Provincia de Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: Beachfront Mar de las Pampas resort with spa, sauna, semi-covered pool, hydromassage tubs and king suites. More family-capable than intimate, but the dune-front suite-and-spa setup belongs on the romantic shortlist.

price.note: BrightData scrape for Aug 19-20, 2026 showed a King Suite from US$119 for 1 night; apartment categories were much higher.

romance.why: Beachfront, spa, sauna and king-suite inventory. Family resort amenities pull it below the quieter campo and town boutiques.

hotels.name: Estancia El Ombú de Areco
hotels.fullAddress: Ruta 31 Cuartel VI, Villa Lía, San Antorio de Areco, Provincia de Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: 1880 mansion on a working ranch near Areco. Meals are included; the look is rustic-chic rather than Relais polish, and it still reads as a proper campo stay rather than a highway motel with a gaucho mural.

price.note: BrightData search found Kayak rates from US$561; provider availability can vary by dates.
price.includes: Check full-board inclusions with the booking provider

romance.why: Real 1880 ranch stay with meals included. Solid campo, a bit more tourist-estancia than private house.

hotels.name: Villa Isidro Hotel Boutique & Spa
hotels.fullAddress: Av. del Libertador 15935, B1642 San Isidro, Provincia de Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: Small San Isidro boutique-spa option with garden pool, sauna, Scottish showers and hydromassage rooms. Less historic and less elegant than Hotel del Casco, but still a real upscale couples-night option close to the city.

price.note: BrightData scrape for Aug 19-20, 2026 showed a Standard Double from US$196 and hydromassage double from US$239.

romance.why: Boutique spa, garden pool and hydromassage rooms near San Isidro casco. It is useful and upscale, but less special than Hotel del Casco.

hotels.name: Pampas de Areco Hotel & Spa
hotels.fullAddress: Ruta 41 kilometro 271, B2760 San Antonio de Areco, Provincia de Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: Neocolonial spa hotel with 30 rooms, adults only (18+), about 90 minutes from Buenos Aires. Spa Aguaribay does couple packages; this is the polished spa weekend rather than a working estancia.

price.includes: No inclusions listed in Kayak scrape
price.note: BrightData scrape showed Kayak deals from US$121 nightly with fees; higher room categories were also listed.

romance.why: Adults-only spa with couple packages. Polished weekend hotel, not a country house.

hotels.name: Un Alto en la Huella
hotels.sourceName: Un Alto en la Huella - Hotel Spa & Wellness Resort
hotels.fullAddress: Cam. Ricardo Güiraldes 465, B2760 San Antonio de Areco, Provincia de Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: Spa hotel on the edge of Areco, 12+ only, with heated pool and Spa La Aguada. Closer to a wellness weekend than a polo fantasy; still quiet enough for a proper couple of nights out of the city.

price.note: BrightData Google result showed about US$141 with taxes and fees; Booking.com page is live for date searches.

romance.why: Wellness spa on the edge of Areco. Quiet and clean, but the register is detox, not dinner-and-fireplace.
